stemHtml: Which of the following statements is true about Anaemic Hypoxia?

options.a: It is caused by low saturation levels of oxygen in the blood, caused by low partial pressure of inspired oxygen.
options.b: This is caused by a reduced ability of the blood to carry oxygen.
options.c: It results from a blood flow reduction through the tissues.
options.d: It results from an interference with the tissues ability to utlize a normal oxygen supply for oxidative processes.
